'''zachuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabdomancy|rabdomancy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabdomancy|rabdomancy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zachuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæchithith|zæchithith]] || [[word:zæchithij|zæchithij]] || [[word:zæchithish|zæchithish]] || [[word:zæchithi|zæchithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zachuchuthuth|zachuchuthuth]] || [[word:zachuchuthuj|zachuchuthuj]] || [[word:zachuchuthush|zachuchuthush]] || [[word:zachuchuthu|zachuchuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zachuthuth|zachuthuth]] || [[word:zachuthuj|zachuthuj]] || [[word:zachuthush|zachuthush]] || [[word:zachuthu|zachuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zachufthuth|zachufthuth]] || [[word:zachufthuj|zachufthuj]] || [[word:zachufthush|zachufthush]] || [[word:zachufthuf|zachufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zachuthuthu|zachuthuthu]] || [[word:zachuthuju|zachuthuju]] || [[word:zachuthushu|zachuthushu]] || [[word:zachuthuku|zachuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zachuthuth|zachuthuth]] || [[word:zachuthuj|zachuthuj]] || [[word:zachuthush|zachuthush]] || [[word:zachuthu|zachuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zachuthuthul|zachuthuthul]] || [[word:zachuthujul|zachuthujul]] || [[word:zachuthushul|zachuthushul]] || [[word:zachuthukul|zachuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zachuthuthuthu|zachuthuthuthu]] || [[word:zachuthujuju|zachuthujuju]] || [[word:zachuthushushu|zachuthushushu]] || [[word:zachuthuku|zachuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zachuthuthun|zachuthuthun]] || [[word:zachuthujun|zachuthujun]] || [[word:zachuthushun|zachuthushun]] || [[word:zachuthukun|zachuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zachuthuthuoro|zachuthuthuoro]] || [[word:zachuthujuoro|zachuthujuoro]] || [[word:zachuthushuoro|zachuthushuoro]] || [[word:zachuthukuoro|zachuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
